title: Djovan Velasco
text: Aspiring data scientist with a B.S. in Statistics and Data Science at UCLA. Experienced in computational statistics, regression modeling, and predictive analytics using R and Python. Deeply interested in data engineering and analytics, with a drive to transform complex datasets into actionable insights and measurable impact. Passionate about sports and applying data as a tool to foster player growth.
